scripts.db:up: sh -c 'docker compose up -d postgres || docker-compose up -d postgres'
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:up && pnpm db:wait && pnpm db:migrate
scripts.db:reset: sh -c '(docker compose down -v || docker-compose down -v) && (docker compose up -d postgres || docker-compose up -d postgres)' && pnpm db:wait && pnpm db:migrate
scripts.db:logs: sh -c 'docker compose logs -f postgres || docker-compose logs -f postgres'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @3plates/contract typecheck && pnpm --filter @3plates/db typecheck && pnpm --filter @3plates/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @3plates/mobile typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @3plates/contract test && pnpm --filter @3plates/api test && pnpm --filter @3plates/mobile test
